visualLogic.subject: See every step of data
visualLogic.body: We don't just show code — we expose every pointer shift, node state change, and recursive call as it happens. Graph traversal, tree expansion, linked list rewiring: nothing is a black box.

interactiveLearning.subject: Watch the animation,
interactiveLearning.body: Watching isn't enough. Every data structure has an interactive challenge — insert a node by hand, walk BFS on the canvas yourself. Do it a few times and the algorithm becomes muscle memory.

julian.bio: What is sleep? Just 24/7 coding and running

kai.bio: Trading three hours of sleep a day for time with the 2D world

kenny.bio: Soy milk is my favorite — muscles, muscles, muscles

techStack.title: Built on a
techStack.desc: Every layer chosen deliberately, from UI rendering down to the database.

milestones.title: From the first commit to a

items.title: Visualization Engine
items.body: Built the animation core from scratch — Array, Linked List, Stack, Queue, Binary Tree, and sorting algorithms, with a Pseudo code line-sync system.

items.title: Trees, Graphs &
items.body: Expanded to BST, BFS/DFS, Graph, and Dijkstra. Built the draggable three-column layout and dynamic Inspector Panel that define the Tutorial page.

items.title: Full Platform,
items.body: Migrated from Supabase to a self-hosted PostgreSQL. Shipped Google OAuth, daily check-in, XP system, and four interactive mini-games.

items.title: AI Analysis Engine
items.body: Built the full code analysis pipeline: Docker sandbox execution, AST complexity analysis, Big-O curve fitting, MiniLM algorithm detection, and Gemini AI reports.

items.title: Heap, DLL &
items.body: Added Heap and Doubly Linked List animations. Playground gained SSE streaming and history. Design System unified across all pages.
